uplink.description: Multical standard frame: energy, volume, power, flow, flow/return temperature, serial and error flag.
uplink._note: Upstream example 1. energy 24322150 kWh -> 24322150000 Wh; volume 580424 m3 -> 580424000 L; power 5520 kW -> 5520000 W; flow_temperature -> water.temperature.current. Derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js and mapping to vocabulary.

uplink.description: Second Multical standard frame with zero power/flow and no error flag.
uplink._note: Upstream example 2. Confirms cumulative water.total and metering.energy.total with zero instantaneous power/flow. Derived via reference/upstream-codec.js.
Only fPort 2 carries the standard heat-meter frame; any other port errors.

uplink.description: Payload shorter than 40 bytes is rejected.
uplink._note: Upstream guards on a minimum standard-frame length of 40 bytes.

uplink.description: Non-standard frame type (first byte != 0x15) is rejected.

errors: Payload type unknown, currently standard format supported

uplink._note: Only the 0x15 standard format is implemented upstream; other frame types error.
